overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the Night City Area Rapid Transit (NCART) train in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through an elevated urban corridor at night. The journey transitions from enclosed passages between dark buildings with neon accents to an open panoramic view of the illuminated Night City skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train corridor between dark commercial buildings

events.description: bright yellow neon structure illuminates the train interior as it passes by

agents.ego_description: riding the NCART train through a narrow elevated corridor between dark buildings, passing illuminated advertisements

entered.detail: large illuminated poster with 'AVANTE' text and figure, mounted on building exterior
building facade with long horizontal illuminated window strips showing interior office space
tall building accent with bright yellow vertical neon lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside the NCART train traveling through a narrow elevated corridor. An advertisement poster for 'AVANTE' is visible on the left, while the train passes buildings with horizontal office windows. A bright yellow neon structure on the right provides a sudden burst of warm light against the cool night atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching NCART station with corporate architecture and street views below

events.description: train approaches station platform with Militech corporate building becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: continuing on the elevated train past the Militech building, approaching the station infrastructure

entered.detail: angular building with illuminated teal 'M' Militech corporate logo on facade
covered train station platform with concrete structure and lighting

segments.scene_description: The train moves past the distinctive Militech building with its glowing teal logo, transitioning from the narrow corridor toward the station. The yellow neon structure and initial poster fade behind as the station platform infrastructure comes into view on the right, with street-level traffic lights visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station platform with prominent transit branding and interior seating

events.description: train slows while passing through the Pacifica station platform area

agents.ego_description: passing through the station interior with large NCART signage and transit maps visible on the walls

entered.detail: large teal and cream 'Night City Area Rapid Transit' wall signage with bold typography
red LED destination display reading 'PACIFICA' inside the train cabin
empty gray bench seating with blue accents along the train interior walls

segments.scene_description: The train passes through the covered station platform, revealing large teal NCART branding on the walls. The interior of the train shows empty bench seats and a red 'PACIFICA' destination sign. The train slows as it moves through this sheltered transit zone with concrete platforms visible outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train with panoramic Night City skyline view and dense skyscrapers

events.description: train exits station into open air revealing the expansive Night City skyline
ambient blue city glow becomes dominant as fog layer visible between buildings

agents.ego_description: riding with expansive view of the illuminated Night City skyline, observing the dense cluster of skyscrapers

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents stretching across the horizon
large floating advertisement screen displaying animated content between buildings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the station, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of the Night City skyline. Dense clusters of illuminated skyscrapers rise against the dark sky, with a layer of fog hovering between the lower buildings. The train continues elevated above the city, providing a cinematic view of the urban landscape with holographic billboards and towering corporate structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from within a train as it moves from a claustrophobic urban corridor into a vast, panoramic vista of the city skyline. It begins by gliding through a narrow elevated passage, passing an Avante advertisement and office windows before a bright yellow neon structure casts a sudden warm glow across the cool night air. As the train moves past the glowing teal Militech logo, the corridor opens up to reveal station platform infrastructure and street-level traffic lights below. The scene then shifts into a sheltered transit zone, passing large teal NCART branding and concrete platforms while the interior reveals empty seats and a red Pacifica destination sign. Finally, the train exits the station and the view expands dramatically into a breathtaking skyline of illuminated skyscrapers and holographic billboards rising above a layer of low-lying fog.
